proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { (x0.is_prime and x1.is_prime and x0 != x1 and lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(x2 * x3, (x0 - 1) * (x1 - 1)) = 1) = is_rsa_key(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(p, q, e, d)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { k0 * ((p - 1) * (q - 1)) + lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(e * d)((p - 1) * (q - 1)) = e * d }

proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(q - 1, p - 1)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }(k, q - 1, p - 1)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }(k, p - 1, q - 1)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(x0, x1) = lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(x2, x1) = x0.congr_mod(x2, x1) }(lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(m.pow(e), n).pow(d), n, m.pow(e * d))

goal: rsa_decrypt(rsa_encrypt(m, e, p * q), d, p * q) = lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(m.pow(e))(p * q).pow(d))(p * q)
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(x0.pow(x1), x2) = rsa_decrypt(x0, x1, x2) }(rsa_encrypt(m, e, p * q), d, p * q)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(x0.pow(x1), x2) = rsa_encrypt(x0, x1, x2) }(m, e, p * q)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(x0, x1) = lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(x2, x1) = x0.congr_mod(x2, x1) }(m.pow(e * d), p * q, m)

goal: rsa_decrypt(rsa_encrypt(m, e, p * q), d, p * q) = m
